title: orchis punctulata subsp. adenocheila
intro: Orchis punctulata subsp. adenocheila, also known as the Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Orchis punctulata subsp. adenocheila include its ability to treat various health issues such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and respiratory problems, due to its diuretic and expectorant properties. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the roots, which can be used in teas, infusions, or as a powder for oral consumption.
